prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Panther Claw, Panther Style.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Panther Style, your retaliatory unarmed strikes are resolved before the triggering attacks. If your retaliatory unarmed strike deals damage to an opponent, that opponent takes a â2 penalty on attack and damage rolls with the triggering attack of opportunity.
